goal: Prepare an email draft to send the updated contract to the client
scope: Draft the outbound email and identify the attachment to use; do not send the email without explicit approval
constraints: Do not send or schedule the email
Do not attach any file that is not clearly identified as the latest intended contract version
Keep the message concise and action-oriented
success_criteria: Clearly identifies the intended recipient and attachment requirements
Surfaces any ambiguity about recipient, version, or destination

missing: Confirmation that the provided contract is the correct final version

assumptions: Assume the task is draft-first rather than send-now
Assume the latest uploaded contract is the intended attachment candidate unless contradicted
Assume user review is required before external send
completion_definition: Done when a send-ready email draft is prepared, the intended attachment is identified, and the system is waiting for user approval before sending
fallback_if_blocked: If recipient or final contract version is unclear, prepare the draft body and explicitly request confirmation before execution
